$comment: Canonical: docs/prd.md#112-protocol-asset-vault (issue #482, #531). Expected Uniswap V3 mid prices for the landing-page price strip. `fork_block` must equal testing/ethereum-testnet/config/fork-block.json::block_number — the CI guard `fork_block_aligns_with_expected_prices` in testing/smoke-test/src/fork_manifest.rs fails the build if the fork block changes without refreshing this file. The Playwright e2e test (clients/dapp/tests/e2e/landing-price-strip.spec.ts) checks the dapp's rendered cells against `expected_price` within `tolerance_pct`; the dapp reads from the devnet stub pool contracts deployed by DeployDemoUniswapV3Stubs.s.sol (issue #531). The fork integration test (testing/fork-e2e-rust/tests/landing_price_strip_fork.rs) is skipped unless RMPC_FORK_RPC_URL is set (requires Base archive RPC — see agent-warnings.md). `expected_price` values are the devnet stub seed prices hardcoded in DeployDemoUniswapV3Stubs.s.sol: ETH/USD≈$2500, cbBTC/USDC≈$60000, wSOL/USDC≈$150.
$capture_note: expected_price values match the stub sqrtPriceX96 seeds in DeployDemoUniswapV3Stubs.s.sol (issue #531). The Playwright e2e test reads the dapp which reads from devnet stub pools; the dapp converts sqrtPriceX96 to a display price using the decimal fields in config/dex-pools.json::devnet.pools. These values are exact — tolerance_pct is set to 1% to absorb any floating-point rounding in the dapp's price conversion.
